description: Style Note Crafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag. Product Details Black foldable wallet with textured overlay on the spine Six card holder slots, one slip pocket and one photo id holder in the left fold and a SIM card holder, a zippered pocket and a slip pocket on the right Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight Size Dimensions: 10 cm x 18 cm
